theorem_3_1_rc_equivariance.claim: RC o MambaDNA == MambaDNA o RC
theorem_3_1_rc_equivariance.method: pure-PyTorch reference, verified on both local CPU and Colab
theorem_3_1_rc_equivariance.note: Exact equivariance with non-trivial outputs (output mean-abs 0.061).

official_weights_loaded.weight_tying_confirmed: mamba_rev.{in,out}_proj intentionally tied/newly-init (Caduceus-Ph BiMamba), as expected

root_causes.cause: Single fold (best-of-run) vs paper's 5-fold CV mean; single strong run can edge above the averaged value
root_causes.suggested_fix: Run 5-fold CV (config cv_folds=5) to report a mean+CI comparable to the paper.

root_causes.cause: Default LR 1e-3 happened to be a good point in the paper's {1e-3, 2e-3} grid for this task
